comment: Minimal gateway config in the upstream security model format (schemas/mcp-upstream-config.schema.json). The v1 'env' literal map is rejected at load; forward secrets by NAME via env_allowlist. See examples/mcp/upstreams.example.json for a fully annotated example.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a GitHub issue in a repository

upstreams.name: filesystem
upstreams.comment: Default trust level local-restricted: absolute command path required, nothing forwarded beyond the base environment.
